allow: Bash(mysql -h 127.0.0.1 -P 3306 -u root -pfytyfyty2005 glucose -e "SHOW COLUMNS FROM webinar_chapter_items;")
Bash(mysql -h 127.0.0.1 -P 3306 -u root -pfytyfyty2005 glucose -e "SHOW COLUMNS FROM webinar_chapter_items LIKE 'accessibility';")
Bash(mysql -h 127.0.0.1 -P 3306 -u root -pfytyfyty2005 glucose -e "SELECT type, accessibility, COUNT\(*\) FROM webinar_chapter_items GROUP BY type, accessibility ORDER BY type, accessibility;")
Bash(mysql -h 127.0.0.1 -P 3306 -u root -pfytyfyty2005 glucose -e "SELECT accessibility, COUNT\(*\) FROM files GROUP BY accessibility;")

Bash(mysql -uroot -pfytyfyty2005 glucose -e "SELECT id, type FROM regions WHERE type='city' LIMIT 30; SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS uni_count FROM universities; SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS spec_count FROM specialties; SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS us_count FROM university_specialties; SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS adm_count FROM admission_stats;")

Bash(mysql -uroot -pfytyfyty2005 glucose -N -B -e "SELECT r.id, COALESCE\(rt_kk.title, rt_ru.title\) AS title FROM regions r LEFT JOIN region_translations rt_kk ON rt_kk.region_id = r.id AND rt_kk.locale='kk' LEFT JOIN region_translations rt_ru ON rt_ru.region_id = r.id AND rt_ru.locale='ru' WHERE r.type='city' AND r.country_id IN \(SELECT id FROM regions WHERE type='country' AND id IN \(SELECT id FROM regions r2 LEFT JOIN region_translations rt ON rt.region_id=r2.id WHERE r2.type='country' AND \(rt.title LIKE '%азах%' OR rt.title LIKE '%azakh%'\)\)\) ORDER BY title LIMIT 50;")

Bash(mysql -uroot -pfytyfyty2005 glucose -N -B -e "SELECT r.id, r.type, rt.locale, rt.title FROM regions r LEFT JOIN region_translations rt ON rt.region_id=r.id WHERE r.type='country' ORDER BY r.id LIMIT 30;")

Bash(mysql -uroot -pfytyfyty2005 --default-character-set=utf8mb4 glucose -N -B -e "SELECT r.id, rt.locale, rt.title FROM regions r LEFT JOIN region_translations rt ON rt.region_id=r.id WHERE r.type='country' ORDER BY r.id;")

Bash(mysql -uroot -pfytyfyty2005 --default-character-set=utf8mb4 glucose -N -B -e "SELECT r.id, rt.title FROM regions r INNER JOIN region_translations rt ON rt.region_id=r.id AND rt.locale='kk' WHERE r.type='city' AND r.country_id=1 ORDER BY rt.title LIMIT 50;")

Bash(mysql -uroot -pfytyfyty2005 --default-character-set=utf8mb4 glucose -N -B -e "SELECT r.id, r.type, rt.title FROM regions r INNER JOIN region_translations rt ON rt.region_id=r.id AND rt.locale='kk' WHERE r.country_id=1 AND rt.title IN \('СЕМЕЙ','ӨСКЕМЕН','ҚАРАҒАНДЫ','ТАРАЗ','АҚТАУ','АҚТӨБЕ','ПАВЛОДАР','ОРАЛ','ҚОСТАНАЙ','ҚЫЗЫЛОРДА','КӨКШЕТАУ','АТЫРАУ','ТҮРКІСТАН','ПЕТРОПАВЛ','ЖЕЗҚАЗҒАН','ТАЛДЫҚОРҒАН'\) ORDER BY rt.title;")
Bash(mysql -uroot -pfytyfyty2005 -h127.0.0.1 -P3306 glucose -e "SELECT role_name, status, COUNT\(*\) AS cnt FROM user WHERE deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY role_name, status ORDER BY role_name, status;")

Bash(mysql -uroot -pfytyfyty2005 -h127.0.0.1 -P3306 glucose -e "SELECT role_name, status, COUNT\(*\) AS cnt FROM users WHERE deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY role_name, status ORDER BY role_name, status;")
Bash(mysql -uroot -pfytyfyty2005 -h127.0.0.1 -P3306 glucose -e "SELECT id, name FROM roles;")
Bash(mysql -uroot -pfytyfyty2005 -h127.0.0.1 -P3306 --default-character-set=utf8mb4 glucose -e "SELECT id, name FROM roles;")
Bash(mysql -uroot -pfytyfyty2005 -h127.0.0.1 -P3306 --default-character-set=utf8mb4 glucose -e "SELECT DISTINCT role_id, role_name FROM users WHERE deleted_at IS NULL;")
Bash(mysql -uroot -pfytyfyty2005 -h127.0.0.1 -P3306 --default-character-set=utf8mb4 glucose -e "SELECT webinar_id, quiz_id, chapter_id FROM webinar_quizzes WHERE webinar_id=1 LIMIT 20;")
Bash(mysql -uroot -pfytyfyty2005 -h127.0.0.1 -P3306 --default-character-set=utf8mb4 glucose -e "SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS cnt FROM webinar_quizzes WHERE webinar_id=1;")
